transcript.text: Hello, LoadUser3 ji! Main Priya bol rahi hoon, Imagicaa Theme Park se. Aapne recently 15 May 2026 ke liye tickets cart mein add kiye the — 2 Adult ke liye. Booking complete nahi hui thi, toh socha ek baar remind kar doon. Koi problem thi kya?
टिकट बहुत और प्राइस लग रही थी, एंड देन आई चेक माय शेड्यूल और आई एम नॉट अवेलेबल ऑन 15 मे।
Achcha, theek hai. Toh price ka issue tha aur aap 15 May ko free nahi hain. Koi baat nahi. Kya hum kisi aur date ke liye check kar sakte hain?
15th April ke liye main check kar sakti hoon. Price ki baat hai toh main aapko ek chhota sa discount offer kar sakti hoon, 10% tak. Kya usse help milegi?
It will be good, if you give me 20% discount.
I'm sorry, main maximum 10% ka hi discount de sakti hoon. Usse zyada possible nahi hai. Kya aap 10% discount ke saath consider karenge?
Great! Maine aapko 10% discount ke saath link bhej diya hai SMS pe. Aap check kar lijiye aur booking complete kar sakte hain.
हां, मैं अपने टाइम निकाल के बुक कर दूंगा।
Theek hai! Maine link aapko fir se bhej diya hai. Jab bhi time mile, aap book kar lena. Thank you!
